query:
-- First, see what 4G SIM-type services exist with $0 or $49 placeholder costs
SELECT serviceId, planName, supplierName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerId, discoveryNotes
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4g%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%SIM Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Data Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup Internet%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G SIM%'
)
AND (monthlyCost = 0.00 OR monthlyCost = 49.00)
ORDER BY monthlyCost, planName;
